diseases.name: Malaria
diseases.description: Mosquito-borne infectious disease caused by Plasmodium parasites.
diseases.advice: Seek medical care immediately and take prescribed antimalarial medication.
diseases.prevention: Use mosquito nets, insect repellent, and avoid mosquito bites.

diseases.name: Common Cold
diseases.description: A viral infection affecting the upper respiratory tract.
diseases.advice: Rest, drink warm fluids, and take over-the-counter cold medicine.
diseases.prevention: Wash hands regularly and avoid close contact with sick people.

diseases.name: Influenza
diseases.description: A contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses.
diseases.advice: Rest, drink fluids, and consult a doctor if symptoms worsen.
diseases.prevention: Get vaccinated yearly and practice good hygiene.

diseases.name: COVID-19
diseases.description: Respiratory illness caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus.
diseases.advice: Rest, isolate if contagious, and seek medical care if breathing problems occur.
diseases.prevention: Vaccination, hand washing, and wearing masks in crowded areas.

diseases.name: Tuberculosis
diseases.description: Serious bacterial infection mainly affecting the lungs.
diseases.advice: Seek medical care and complete the full TB treatment course.
diseases.prevention: Early testing and vaccination in high-risk areas.

diseases.name: Pneumonia
diseases.description: Infection that inflames air sacs in one or both lungs.
diseases.advice: Seek medical attention. Antibiotics may be required.
diseases.prevention: Vaccination, hand washing, and avoiding smoking.

diseases.name: Asthma
diseases.description: Chronic condition that inflames and narrows the airways.
diseases.advice: Use prescribed inhalers and avoid triggers such as smoke or dust.

diseases.name: Diabetes
diseases.description: Chronic disease that affects how the body processes blood sugar.
diseases.advice: Monitor blood sugar levels and follow medical treatment plans.
diseases.prevention: Maintain a healthy weight, balanced diet, and exercise regularly.

diseases.name: Hypertension
diseases.description: A condition where blood pressure is consistently too high.
diseases.advice: Reduce salt intake and monitor blood pressure regularly.
diseases.prevention: Exercise, healthy diet, and stress management.

diseases.name: Migraine
diseases.description: A neurological condition causing intense headaches.
diseases.advice: Rest in a dark room and use prescribed migraine medication.
diseases.prevention: Avoid triggers like stress, dehydration, and lack of sleep.

diseases.name: Food Poisoning
diseases.description: Illness caused by eating contaminated food.
diseases.advice: Stay hydrated and rest. Seek medical care if severe.
diseases.prevention: Practice safe food handling and proper cooking.

diseases.name: Appendicitis
diseases.description: Inflammation of the appendix that may require surgery.

diseases.name: Kidney Stones
diseases.description: Hard deposits made of minerals and salts forming in the kidneys.
diseases.advice: Drink plenty of water and consult a doctor for treatment.
diseases.prevention: Stay hydrated and maintain a balanced diet.

diseases.name: Arthritis
diseases.description: Inflammation of joints causing pain and stiffness.
diseases.advice: Exercise gently and take medication prescribed by a doctor.
diseases.prevention: Maintain a healthy weight and stay physically active.

diseases.name: Depression
diseases.description: A mental health disorder affecting mood and daily functioning.
diseases.advice: Seek support from a mental health professional.
diseases.prevention: Maintain social connections and manage stress.

diseases.name: Anxiety Disorder
diseases.description: Mental health disorder characterized by intense fear or worry.
diseases.advice: Practice relaxation techniques and consult a professional.
diseases.prevention: Stress management and healthy lifestyle habits.

diseases.name: Allergy
diseases.description: Immune system reaction to a foreign substance.
diseases.advice: Avoid allergens and take antihistamines if necessary.

diseases.name: Eczema
diseases.description: Chronic condition causing inflamed, itchy skin.
diseases.prevention: Keep skin hydrated and avoid harsh soaps.

diseases.name: Acne
diseases.description: Skin condition occurring when hair follicles become clogged.
diseases.advice: Use acne treatment products and keep skin clean.
